headline: Recovery that fits your life
subtext: A few focused minutes a day, wherever you are.
caption:
Recovery should not mean rearranging your whole life. The most effective nervous-system work happens in small, regular doses.

Neurowaze fits around your day. Short daily check-ins, brief practices and clear next steps mean you can keep momentum from your phone, between everything else you are juggling. Consistency, not intensity, is what retrains the brain.

For people living with chronic pain, fibromyalgia, IBS, tinnitus or long COVID, a programme that fits real life is a programme you can actually stick with.

Start at https://neurowaze.health/start-my-recovery

#ChronicPain #Neuroplasticity #Fibromyalgia #IBS #Tinnitus #LongCovid #MindBody #PainRecovery #Neurowaze
first_comment: Neurowaze is designed for short, consistent daily use, because regular practice is what retrains the nervous system. Begin here: https://neurowaze.health/start-my-recovery
